text: Stepping inside this exhibition, I feel a blend of curiosity and anticipation. The sharp geometry and clear glass doors separate two realms: the everyday outside and this thoughtfully curated interior. As I move closer to the brightly lit R+D wall, philosophical questions about innovation and human coexistence with technology surface in my mind. The poetic text about darkness and light resonates. Being here, I am both an observer and a participant in a space dedicated to reflection and discovery. I feel quietly inspired, my thoughts wandering through the obscurity of possibility, just as the display invites.
